title: Timesheet
subtitle: Track working hours, overtime and attendance for employees

checkIn.title: Today's attendance
checkIn.subtitle: Record your check-in and check-out times
checkIn.done: You're all checked out for today

empty.title: No attendance yet
empty.desc: Your check-ins for this month will appear here.

team.title: Team attendance
team.subtitle: Review and correct your team's attendance

empty.title: No attendance yet
empty.desc: Your team's attendance for this month will appear here.

adjust.title: Adjust attendance
adjust.hint: Leave check-in/out blank to clear the timestamp. Times are in UTC.

overtime.mineSubtitle: Submit and track your overtime for the month

review.actionError: Could not update the overtime request

cap.month: Monthly OT now {{total}}h, over the {{limit}}h cap
cap.year: Yearly OT now {{total}}h, over the {{limit}}h cap

review.rejectDesc: Let the employee know why this request was rejected.
review.rejectPlaceholder: e.g. Outside the approved project window
review.cancelDesc: This pending overtime request will be cancelled. This action cannot be undone.
review.timelineDesc: Approval step history for this overtime request
review.returnDesc: Provide a reason so the employee can edit and resubmit

empty.title: No overtime yet
empty.desc: Your overtime requests for this month will appear here.

form.title: Submit overtime
form.desc: The overtime category is derived by the system from the work date and holiday calendar.
form.categoryHint: The overtime multiplier is snapshotted when a manager approves.
form.resubmitDesc: Edit the details and resubmit for approval from the start

restDay.subtitle: Today is a day off — no need to clock in

holiday.title: Public holiday — {{name}}
holiday.desc: This is a paid day off. If you work today, file a holiday overtime request (≥300%) so it can be approved and paid.

weekend.title: Weekly rest day
weekend.desc: This is your weekly rest day. If you work today, file a weekend overtime request (≥200%) so it can be approved and paid.

restDay.hasOt: An overtime request already exists for today

policy.title: Attendance Policy
policy.subtitle: Configure workdays, night shift and overtime multipliers per labor law
policy.multipliersHint: Per Article 98 Labor Code 2019: weekday ≥150%, weekend ≥200%, holiday ≥300%, night +30%, night OT +20%.

holiday.title: Public Holidays
holiday.subtitle: Yearly holiday calendar — used to classify holiday overtime

empty.title: No holidays yet
empty.desc: Add public holidays for this year so overtime is classified correctly.

form.desc: A holiday overrides weekday/weekend classification when calculating overtime.
form.name: Holiday name
form.recurringHint: Enable for fixed solar-calendar holidays (Apr 30, May 1, Sep 2). Disable for lunar dates (Lunar New Year, Hung Kings).

delete.title: Delete holiday?
delete.desc: The holiday "{{name}}" will be removed. This action cannot be undone.

toast.conflict: A holiday already exists on this date

seed.dialogDesc: This adds the Vietnamese statutory holidays and Tết for {{year}}. Existing entries on the same dates will have their name and recurring flag overwritten. Safe to re-run.

toast.noLunarDesc: Only {{count}} solar holidays were loaded. Tết and Giỗ Tổ are missing — add them manually or update the system.

settings.title: Timesheet settings
settings.subtitle: Configure attendance policy and your company's holiday calendar

timeline.title: Approval Progress
timeline.empty: This request has no approval steps yet

skipReason.NO_APPROVER: No approver found for this step
skipReason.SELF_APPROVAL: Skipped — you cannot approve your own request
skipReason.DUPLICATE_APPROVER: Skipped — same approver as a previous step

flows.title: Overtime Approval Flows
flows.subtitle: Configure overtime approval steps per department or company-wide default
flows.emptyHint: Create your first flow to set up the overtime approval process

form.description: Define the order of approval steps for overtime requests
form.name: Flow name
form.departmentHint: Department cannot be changed after creation
